comment.body:
I would say 50:50. 

Or maybe even both are right in a way and some minions talked about when there could be real talking. So there were just scheduling talks and no tariff talks. 

But Trump not disclosing who talked is kind of sus

comment.body: Does it really matter who‘s lying? The bottom line is that Trump has overplayed his hand, and now has to get out of the tariff issue somehow. Unlike the Chinese, he probably doesn‘t care whether he loses his face in the process.
